description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house includes a small balcony with a metal railing on the upper floor, and the main entryway is accessible via a door on the second level, likely reached by an internal or external staircase. The facade is primarily white with dark trim accents, and the structure sits on a rectangular concrete base. Visible interior elements include beds and sofas, suggesting residential use. The overall design emphasizes minimalism and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with large windows, a flat roof, and a minimalist white facade accented by dark trim and a balcony.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two large windows, a visible bed inside, and a small window above a door on the lower level.
description_view_1: This view highlights the balcony with a metal railing, the main entry door on the upper floor, and a large window revealing a sofa inside.
description_view_2: This view displays a broad side with two large windows, one showing a sofa and the other a table, and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: This view presents the front facade with the main entry door on the upper level, a balcony, and large windows revealing beds and living spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry on upper level with a simple door, accessed via balcony, no porch or decorative columns, minimalist design
